chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-215 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge (s) Before; Mr. Justice Arshad Hussain Khan Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah 1. For orders on M.A. No.1213/2021. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. No.1214/2021. 4. For orders on M.A. No.1214/2021. 5. For hearing of main case. 18.02.2021. Petitioner present in person. == 1. Urgency granted. 2to5. The petitioner being aggrieved of the issuance of work orders soon after making an application with Chairman Redressal Committee for redressal of his grievance, has filed the instant petition before this Court for enquiry etc. The petitioner may wait for the decision to be taken by Chairman Redressal Committee on his application and then to approach this Court for the needful, if his grievance is not redressed. The instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with the listed applications. Judge Judge Ahmed/Pa,
